trade.summary: Growing bilateral trade. Switzerland exports gold, pharmaceuticals, machinery, and chemicals to India. India exports textiles, pharmaceuticals, IT services, and jewelry. EFTA-India free trade agreement signed in 2024 is expected to boost trade significantly.

diplomatic.summary: Warm and growing relationship. India appreciates Switzerland's neutrality and role as a financial center. EFTA-India FTA signed in 2024 marks a major milestone. Switzerland supports India's UN Security Council ambitions. Growing people-to-people ties.

military.summary: No military alliance. Switzerland's neutrality precludes defense cooperation. No joint exercises or arms transfers of significance.

financial.summary: Switzerland manages significant Indian private wealth. Swiss banks are active in India's financial markets. Indian IT companies have Swiss offices. Growing FDI in both directions, especially in pharmaceuticals.

energy.summary: Limited direct energy trade. Switzerland cooperates with India on clean energy and hydropower technology. Indian IT firms support Swiss energy sector digitization.

scientific.summary: Growing scientific partnership. ETH Zurich and Swiss universities collaborate with IITs and TIFR on materials science, computing, and clean energy. Joint publications increasing rapidly.
